name: 5" Decorative Lacquer Box Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring decorative flair to your shelf with this Lacquer Box from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This hexagonal decorative box is made from metal and has a lacquered finish that adds a touch of bling. It has a blue hue and adds a minimalist look to your home decor. Plus, the removable lid gives you the flexibility to store various items.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
